name: Ole Miss Marina Colvill Park
description: Ole Miss Marina Colvill Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Red Wing, MN. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Pine Island Pickleball Courts
description: Pine Island Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Pine Island, MN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The court lines are permanent. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Red Wing Family YMCA
description: Red Wing Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Red Wing, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Twin Bluff Middle School
description: Twin Bluff Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Red Wing, MN. There are 12 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
